name: CapCut Creator Reference
description: A fast AI creator-suite system inspired by CapCut public editor and landing surfaces, with high-contrast panels, template rails, timeline controls, and social-video export flows.

en.name: CapCut Creator Reference
en.description: A fast AI creator-suite system inspired by CapCut public editor and landing surfaces, with high-contrast panels, template rails, timeline controls, and social-video export flows.

zh-CN.name: CapCut 创作者参考
zh-CN.description: 受 CapCut 公开编辑器和落地页启发的高速 AI 创作套件系统，包含高对比面板、模板轨道、时间线控件和短视频导出流程。
